articles.title: JPMORGAN BELIEVES BITCOIN IS UNDERVALUED, SEES $126K BY YEAR-END
articles.summary: Bitcoin's current price is “too low” relative to gold as volatility hits record lows, setting a fair value of $126,000 by year-end. Corporate treasury accumulation, index-driven inflows from Strategy and Metaplanet, and reduced volatility seems to have boosted bitcoin's institutional appeal. With BTC's volatility ratio to gold at a record 2.0, Bitcoin is closer than ever to gold on a risk-adjusted basis.

articles.title: US GOVERNMENT PUBLISHES MACROECONOMIC DATA ONCHAIN
articles.summary: The U.S. Commerce Department has begun distributing key macroeconomic data on public blockchains in partnership with Chainlink and Pyth, starting with GDP and inflation indicators anchored to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Base, Avalanche, Arbitrum, and Optimism, opening new use cases for DeFi, prediction markets, and tokenized assets. The data is hashed onchain to ensure integrity. Secretary Howard Lutnick says the move makes “America's economic truth immutable and globally accessible,” highlighting 3.3% GDP growth as the first data point published.

articles.title: EULEREARN: PASSIVE YIELD, PROFESSIONALLY CURATED
articles.summary: EulerEarn is a permissionless passive yield platform where anyone can deploy and manage ERC-4626 vault strategies without gatekeeping. It features non-custodial, immutable core contracts with timelock and guardian protections for risk-sensitive actions. The system enables curators to professionally manage up to 30 strategies per vault with defined allocation caps, supply/withdrawal queues, and yield smearing mechanisms to optimize returns while maintaining liquidity and reducing MEV risks. Curators can earn up to 50% performance fees while users hold a single token representing their aggregated pool share. The platform supports full ERC20Votes governance functionality for community-driven control.

articles.title: INTRODUCING $AVNT: THE TOKEN FOR UNIVERSAL LEVERAGE
articles.summary: Avantis, a leading derivatives DEX on Base, has launched $AVNT, a utility and governance token designed to secure its protocol, align incentives, and decentralize governance. Since its February 2024 mainnet debut, Avantis has processed $18B+ in volume, onboarded 38,500+ traders, and listed 80+ markets. The token grants stakers fee discounts and rewards, dedicates 50.1% of supply to community incentives, and aims to scale its "Universal Leverage Layer" to capture demand in the $1 quadrillion RWA derivatives market.

articles.title: THE INVISIBLE UPGRADE: WHY INSTITUTIONS SHOULD CARE ABOUT CRYPTO RAILS
articles.summary: Institutional finance is undergoing a fundamental infrastructure upgrade through crypto rails, moving beyond speculative use cases to address core operational inefficiencies in traditional systems like T+2 settlement and fragmented reconciliation processes. Zero-knowledge proofs enable institutions to maintain privacy while proving compliance, solvency, or creditworthiness without exposing sensitive portfolio data to centralized gatekeepers who create security vulnerabilities. Ethereum's L2 scaling solutions offer real-time settlement and near-zero cost transactions with built-in execution guarantees, while smart contracts can enforce compliance, portfolio limits, and trading mandates natively rather than through retrofitted oversight systems.

articles.title: HIRING FOR CRYPTO BD ROLES
articles.summary: Hiring for BD in crypto is different from Web2 because tokens, DAOs, and open-source ecosystems change how partnerships and growth work. Early-stage teams need scrappy hires who can experiment and adapt, but after product-market fit, you need specialists who can scale pipelines and systems. Defining roles clearly and avoiding over-hiring too senior or too generalist too early is critical to unlocking sustainable growth.

articles.title: HOW MONAD GOT CT ON ITS SIDE
articles.summary: Monad's "Monad Cards" distribution strategy targets crypto influencers with established relevance, rewarding organic social capital rather than project-specific engagement. Unlike common pre-TGE growth hacks, this approach leverages decentralized nominations to reduce insider bias and align with crypto's cultural emphasis on fairness. By empowering recipients to nominate others, Monad addresses historical criticisms of airdrop centralization, enhancing perceived legitimacy and fostering a stronger foundation for its ecosystem.

articles.title: LIQUIDITY AS AN OPERATING SYSTEM
articles.summary: HyperEVM is a programmable financial operating system built directly on top of Hyperliquid's profitable exchange infrastructure, which processes $300B monthly volume and generates over $1B annualized profit. It differentiates from typical EVM chains by being natively integrated with proven liquidity and user demand, allowing developers to access existing trading flows and monetization primitives, including Builder Codes, HIP-3 market deployment fees, and HYPE staking rewards from day one.

articles.title: PENNY FOR YOUR THOUGHTS
articles.summary: Penny for Your Thoughts is a new experiment from Plastic Labs that uses Honcho, a tool for AI memory and cognition, alongside x402, to allow users to train an AI with their knowledge and have other people pay to consult it.

articles.title: RAIN BACKED TO BRIDGE STABLECOINS AND TRADFI PAYMENTS
articles.summary: Rain is reinventing money movement, credit, and settlement flows onchain, driving stablecoin adoption beyond crypto-native use cases.

articles.title: STABLECOINS AS AMERICA'S DOLLAR EXPORT ENGINE
articles.summary: Stablecoins are the fastest way for the U.S. to export dollars globally.

articles.title: FARCASTER: DECENTRALIZED SOCIAL BUILT ON ETHEREUM
articles.summary: Farcaster is a decentralized social protocol on Ethereum that gives users ownership of their data, identity, and social graph.
